pages.text: $(bold)Grows:$() plant this seed to raise its dynamic tree.$(br2)$(bold)Convert:$() this seed + $(italic)Dirt$() → $(italic)Yellow Blossom Sapling$() (shapeless, one-way).
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
